allow:
Bash(DOMAIN="src/Modules/Identity/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Domain/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Domain.csproj"
APP="src/Modules/Identity/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Application/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Application.csproj"
INFRA="src/Modules/Identity/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Infrastructure/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Infrastructure.csproj"
CONTRACTS="src/Modules/Identity/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Contracts/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Contracts.csproj"
API="src/BloomWatch.Api/BloomWatch.Api.csproj"

dotnet add "$APP" reference "$DOMAIN" 2>&1
dotnet add "$INFRA" reference "$APP" "$DOMAIN" 2>&1
dotnet add "$CONTRACTS" reference "$DOMAIN" 2>&1
dotnet add "$API" reference "$INFRA" "$CONTRACTS" 2>&1)

Bash(export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet/tools" && dotnet ef migrations add InitialIdentitySchema --project src/Modules/Identity/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Infrastructure --output-dir Persistence/Migrations 2>&1)

Bash(export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet/tools" && dotnet ef database update --project src/Modules/Identity/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Infrastructure/BloomWatch.Modules.Identity.Infrastructure.csproj --startup-project src/BloomWatch.Api/BloomWatch.Api.csproj 2>&1)

Bash(sleep 6 && curl -s -w "\\nHTTP Status: %{http_code}\\n" http://localhost:5192/auth/register -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"alice@example.com","password":"password123","displayName":"Alice"}' 2>&1)
Bash(git-cz --non-interactive --type chore --subject "initialize solution with architecture docs and gitignore")
